zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes d'Arques於大約1105年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親Osbern d'Arques47歲，母親Rohese de Bollington37歲。她於大約1112年與Héribert de Saint-Quintin III在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1164年之後在英國越可爾利，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes d'Arques于大约1105年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲Osbern d'Arques47岁，母亲Rohese de Bollington37岁。她于大约1112年与Héribert de Saint-Quintin III在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1164年之后在英国越可爾利，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁利。

nameMeanings.name: d'Arques
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Mario, Luis, Fernando, Jorge, Armando, Ana, Joaquin, Julio, Marcos.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Henrique, Lourenco, Seraphine, Vasco.

Catalan (Marquès); Spanish and southern French (Marqués): from Catalan marquès, Spanish and Occitan marqués ‘marquis’, words of French origin (see Marquis ), applied either as a nickname for someone who behaved like a marquis or as an occupational name for a servant in the household of a marquis.
Portuguese: patronymic from the personal name   Marcos  .

variants.name: Marquis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Normand, Marcel, Fernand, Lucien, Rosaire, Andre, Armand, Camille, Cecile, Jacques, Francois.

French: from the title marquis ‘marquess’, applied as an ironic nickname to someone who behaved like a marquis or as a metonymic occupational name for a servant in the household of a marquis. The title, derived from an ancient Germanic word meaning ‘boundary’ (compare March ), originally referred to the governor of a border territory. Marquises did not form part of the original French feudal structure of nobility; the title was first adopted by the Counts of Toulouse because of their possessions in the border region beyond the Rhône. Compare Markee and Markey .

English: nickname from Middle English markis ‘marquis, marquess, nobleman’ (Old French marchis); see also 1 above. The word is also found as a female personal name which may also be origin of the surname.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes d'Arques was born about 1105, in Yorkshire, England, her father, Osbern d'Arques, was 47 and her mother, Rohese de Bollington, was 37. She married Héribert de Saint-Quintin III about 1112, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died after 1164, in Rise, Yorkshire, England, and was buried in Rise, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes d'Arques est née environ 1105, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Osbern d'Arques, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Rohese de Bollington, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Héribert de Saint-Quintin III environ 1112, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée après 1164, à Rise, Everwyck, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Rise, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes d'Arquesが約1105年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Osbern d'Arquesは47歳，母Rohese de Bollingtonは37歳であった。約1112年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでHéribert de Saint-Quintin IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1164年以後にイギリスヨークシュアイアリゼで死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングリゼにて埋葬された。

ko.Brandesburton, Holderness, East Yorkshir: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 브랜데스버턴
ko.Rise, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 리스
ko.lifeSummary: Agnes d'Arques(이)가 대략 1105년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Osbern d'Arques(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rohese de Bollington(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 대략 1112년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Héribert de Saint-Quintin III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1164년 이후 영국 요르크실르 리스에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes d'Arques nasceu aproximadamente 1105, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Osbern d'Arques, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Rohese de Bollington, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Héribert de Saint-Quintin III aproximadamente 1112, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu após 1164, em Rise, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Rise, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Brandesburton, Holderness, East Yorkshir: брэндесбуртон, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Rise, Yorkshire, England: рис, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes d'Arques родилась около 1105 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Osbern d'Arques было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Rohese de Bollington, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Héribert de Saint-Quintin III около 1112 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла после 1164 г. в местности рис, еркшир, Англия и была похоронена в местности рис, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания.
